project.title: Proximity labelling and LCMSMS analysis of spliceosome complexes using SUGP1-miniTurbo
project.projectDescription: The purpose of the project is to identify proteins binding differentially to the human specific spliceosomal protein SUGP1 in the context of point mutations to its G-patch domain.  SUGP1 wt and mutant (G603N or L570E) C-terminally tagged with mini-Turbo-NLS was overexpressed for 48 h in HEK293T cells prior to a 2 min labelling pulse with 200 µM biotin. A non-transfection control was included and all samples were prepared in four independent biological replicates. Biotinylated proteins were captured by incubating total cell lysates for 30 min at 4 °C with streptavidin beads. The enrichment was then performed exactly as described in Cho et al. Nat Protoc 15, 3971–3999 (2020) pmid: 33139955
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Protein digestion was performed on-beads. Sample-incubated streptavidin magnetic beads were treated with 5 mM TCEP in 10 mM TEAB, and alkylation followed with 15 mM iodoacetamide, followed by overnight treatment with LysC and then trypsin, peptide recovery and TMT labelling for mass spectrometry analysis
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data were searched with Protein Prospector against the human subset of the SwissProt database (SwissProt.2019.07.31) plus the corresponding randomized sequences to calculate FRD on the searches), using Protein Prospector. 1% FDR was allowed on searches.

experimentTypes.name: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

references.referenceLine: Beusch I, Rao B, Studer MK, Luhovska T, Šukytė V, Lei S, Oses-Prieto J, SeGraves E, Burlingame A, Jonas S, Madhani HD. Targeted high-throughput mutagenesis of the human spliceosome reveals its in vivo operating principles. Mol Cell. 2023 83(14):2578-2594.e9

Characteristics[Label]: TMTPro™-16 label plex kit instructions (ThermoFisher Scientific)
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: 1 μg of LysC (Fujifilm Wako Pure Chemical Corporation)
Characteristics[SpikedCompound]: a biotin pulse of 2 min biotin (culture media supplemented with 200 μM biotin)
Characteristics[Specimen]: 6 million HEK293T cells were seeded on 150 mm plates
Comment[Separation]: 2 μm, 75μm ID x 50 cm PepMap RSLC C18 EasySpray column (Thermo Scientific)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: MS spectra were acquired between 375 and 1500 m/z with a resolution of 120000.
For each MS spectrum, multiply charged ions over the selected threshold (2E4) were selected for MSMS in cycles of 3 seconds with an isolation window of 0.7 m/z.
Comment[FragmentationMethod]: Precursor ions were fragmented by HCD using stepped relative collision energies of 30, 35 and 40 to ensure efficient generation of sequence ions as well as TMT reporter ions.
Comment[CollisionEnergy]: stepped relative collision energies of 30, 35 and 40
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: Mass tolerance was 10 ppm in MS
Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer]: MSMS spectra were acquired in centroid mode with resolution 60000 from m/z=110.
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: up to 2 missed cleavages per peptide were allowed.
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: labelled proteins purified under stringent conditions using streptavidin.
